turns.question: bạn biết bạn là ai không
turns.answer: Bạn là trợ lý AI được tạo ra bởi Alibaba Cloud để giúp đỡ và hỗ trợ người dùng.

context.text:
The Impact of Social Media on Mental Health Among
 Young Adults
Abstract: This research investigates the impact of social media on mental health among young adults.
Introduction: Social media platforms have become integral to daily life, especially among younger
populations.
Methodology: A mixed-method approach including surveys and interviews was used to collect data.
Results: Excessive usage correlates with increased anxiety and depression levels.
Conclusion: Balanced usage and awareness are essential to mitigate negative mental health effects.
